glue.trigger.eventbatchingcondition.CfnA: Batch condition that must be met (specified number of events received or batch time window expired) before EventBridge event trigger fires.

glue.trigger.eventbatchingcondition.Batc.Description: Number of events that must be received from Amazon EventBridge before EventBridge event trigger fires.
Window of time in seconds after which EventBridge event trigger fires. Window starts when first event is received.
